reviews.comment:
Buenas cantidad de surtidores, aunque no siempre están todos habilitados. Bar y kiosco cumplen... El estacionamiento es bastante amplio y por supuesto hay servicio de gomería y mecánica ligera en días y horario laborales.

(Translated by Google)
A good number of pumps, although not all are always open. The bar and kiosk are fully operational. The parking lot is quite spacious, and of course, there's tire and light mechanic service available during business days and hours.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBcUp2OERnEAE
